paragraphs.title: Contact Your Instructor
paragraphs.p: The best way to contact me is by using the D2L Brightspace email system from the D2L Course Info, Classlist tool. You can use it to send an email to me or your classmates. You can also email me directly, but there is a slighlty better chance I will see your email sooner if you use the D2L Classlist tool.

If your question/comment would be of interest to other students, please consider posting it to the Ask a Question Discussions area instead. Then I can publicly answer your question, and the entire class might benefit.
We can also talk in class or in office hours. (See for office hour times and locations.)

paragraphs.title: Responses from Your Instructor
paragraphs.p: I will reply to your emails and discussion posts within 48 hours, and often much sooner. If you send me a message in the evening, it's more likely that I won't reply until the following day. Please don't wait until the evening an assignment is due to reach out to me for help, or else I might not be able to reply until it is too late.

paragraphs.title: Discord
paragraphs.p: This course has a Discord server, and I recommend that you join. If you have never used Discord before, what matters is that I think it is a great way for you to connect with other students outside of class. You are not required to join Discord but please give it a try. An invitation link is posted in our D2L course, in the course landing page.
